title: ctenopteris ciliaris
intro: Ctenopteris ciliaris, also known as the ciliate wood fern or ciliate maidenhair, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenopteris ciliaris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris ciliaris is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
